effective_note: Illustrative referral-style buckets aligned with Cortex order-financial modeling (Keepa/SP-API category → bucket). Verify against Seller Central before commercial use.
pick_pack_note: FBA fulfillment and 3PL pick/pack are separate from referral % — see warehouse pricing profiles and amazon_fba_fulfillment_audit tables in the engine.

buckets.label: Default / most categories
buckets.notes: Typical US referral; $0.30/item minimum unless exempt bucket.

buckets.label: Grocery & gourmet
buckets.notes: Often exempt from per-item referral minimum in Seller Central carve-outs.

buckets.label: Media (closing fee path)
buckets.notes: May include closing fee; % referral modeled separately in full audit.

buckets.label: Home & kitchen
buckets.notes: Broad category defaulting to standard referral.

fba_fulfillment_reference.description: Per-unit weight tiers for US non-apparel small/large standard — see amazon_fees_audit_us.py in CortexBackend.
